# Second Act Labs

> Independent software studio. Tools built to solve real problems. No team. No runway. Just shipping.

## Products

### GenCatalog
Local AI image and video organizer for Grok Imagine, Gemini, GPT Image, Midjourney, Higgsfield, Digen, and Venice.ai. Captures prompts, metadata, and media automatically on Mac and Windows. $79 one-time.
[gencatalog.app](https://gencatalog.app)

## About

Second Act Labs is an independent software studio building tools for the AI era. Anonymous founder, shipping in public.
